title: Hezbollah Plunges Lebanon Back Into War Despite Its Weakness
author: Christina Goldbaum
fullText: The militant group’s attacks, apparently at the behest of Iran, led to retaliation from Israel and were “practically a suicide mission” for Hezbollah, an analyst said.
summary: The militant group’s attacks, apparently at the behest of Iran, led to retaliation from Israel and were “practically a suicide mission” for Hezbollah, an analyst said.
